title: habenaria odorata
intro: Habenaria odorata, also known as the fragrant yellow orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Habenaria odorata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
